title: ReCreatedGoggles
description: A biased recreation of the Create mod goggles!
body:
I didn't like how the create mod goggles looked. I think they look bad. I'm being a bit harsh actually but I still didn't like them.

So. I made my own model. Its designed to look more like the item texture, and use a flat texture instead of small yucky 3D cubes.

It replaces the [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) goggles model (duh), but you can use them in vanilla too using a carved pumpkin with the custom model data value of "2288".
You can get one with this command:
```
/give @s minecraft:carved_pumpkin{CustomModelData:2288} 1
```
